title: FW request ESP32 S3 N16R8 and DX-LR30 have the SX12621

messages.author: diving1990
messages.text: My question is. Why is there lack of support to create a custom firmware for my hardware? And why is it so hard to create a firmware by the developers that you can customize? or modify to use your own hardware? I want so much to join the Mesh core community and help to get a country wide spread network, But without help getting my hardware running it stops for me. And i have not the money to buy all the expensive devices that are supported by Mesh core. Thanks in advance.
messages.content_html: My question is. Why is there lack of support to create a custom firmware for my hardware? And why is it so hard to create a firmware by the developers that you can customize? or modify to use your own hardware? I want so much to join the Mesh core community and help to get a country wide spread network, But without help getting my hardware running it stops for me. And i have not the money to buy all the expensive devices that are supported by Mesh core. Thanks in advance.

messages.author: Lbibass
messages.text: I mean… you can do the code yourself
messages.content_html: I mean… you can do the code yourself

messages.author: diving1990
messages.text: Yes i can, But to start you need an decent manual and that is the problem nowhere to find, The only information i found is some basic manual but not to compile ect.
messages.content_html: Yes i can, But to start you need an decent manual and that is the problem nowhere to find, The only information i found is some basic manual but not to compile ect.

messages.author: diving1990
messages.text: I wish it was that easy, Its not. I have to add a board variant and also board and modify the rest of the files to have my custom board to be compiled. And that is the problem because there is no instruction on how my files have to met the Meshcore rules if i want to compile my own setup.
messages.content_html: I wish it was that easy, Its not. I have to add a board variant and also board and modify the rest of the files to have my custom board to be compiled. And that is the problem because there is no instruction on how my files have to met the Meshcore rules if i want to compile my own setup.

messages.author: diving1990
messages.text: Finally i have my setup up and running. I did made a custom setup and it works for now.
messages.content_html: Finally i have my setup up and running. I did made a custom setup and it works for now.
